mapper.select: select id, order_id, user_id, commodity_id, commodity_name, commodity_desc, bandwidth, business_suitable, category_id, category_name, category_desc, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from order_information_snapshot where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into order_information_snapshot(id, order_id, user_id, commodity_id, commodity_name, commodity_desc, bandwidth, business_suitable, category_id, category_name, category_desc, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{commodityId}, #{commodityName}, #{commodityDesc}, #{bandwidth}, #{businessSuitable}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{categoryDesc}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into order_information_snapshot(id,order_id, user_id, commodity_id, commodity_name, commodity_desc, bandwidth, business_suitable, category_id, category_name, category_desc, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.orderId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.commodityId}, #{entity.commodityName}, #{entity.commodityDesc}, #{entity.bandwidth}, #{entity.businessSuitable}, #{entity.categoryId}, #{entity.categoryName}, #{entity.categoryDesc}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into order_information_snapshot(id,order_id, user_id, commodity_id, commodity_name, commodity_desc, bandwidth, business_suitable, category_id, category_name, category_desc, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.orderId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.commodityId}, #{entity.commodityName}, #{entity.commodityDesc}, #{entity.bandwidth}, #{entity.businessSuitable}, #{entity.categoryId}, #{entity.categoryName}, #{entity.categoryDesc}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update order_id = values(order_id), user_id = values(user_id), commodity_id = values(commodity_id), commodity_name = values(commodity_name), commodity_desc = values(commodity_desc), bandwidth = values(bandwidth), business_suitable = values(business_suitable), category_id = values(category_id), category_name = values(category_name), category_desc = values(category_desc), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
